case_title: CACH LLC VS. WINSTON PARKHURST et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC SERVED JAN-30-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PARKHURST, WINSTON

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PARKHURST, WINSTON DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-09-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-07-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-24-2008

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARKHURST, WINSTON $1,306.90 PRINCIPAL, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $266.35 INTEREST, $425.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,398.25, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH RE PAYMENT PLAN SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-09-2008 CONTINUED TO AUG-08-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2008, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT PARKHURST, WINSTON
